---
title: '`r paste(emojifont::emoji("globe_with_meridians"),
        "Using NGINX as a Data Person")`'
description: |
  NGINX is a high performance web server that is a very useful skill to pick 
  up as a data person, because delivery of data products usually involves the 
  web and a web browser.
author:
  - name: TJ Palanca
    url: https://www.twitter.com/tjpalanca
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
categories:
  - Web Development
  - Data Science
---

## NGINX as a Data Person

You might be wondering what a data person would be doing tinkering around with 
a web server. It's because of the fact that in order to deliver value 
end-to-end with data products, you're going to need to go all the way from
instrumentation (data collection), to data engineering, to analysis, to 
dashboarding, science, and finally, production. You can achieve that through
having the skills yourself or leveraging your team or company's skillsets to
deliver throughout each stage.

Oftentimes, especially in developing proof-of-concepts, it simply isn't cost justified to be leveraging a whole team.
